Suphal Bhattarai

Audit Associate | Experience since January 2024

Audit Associate with live experience since January 2024, exposure across 14 sectors, and active focus on banking, finance, and IT opportunities. Work spans audit, financial, and consulting assignments aligned with NFRS and IFRS expectations.
